perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are standing inside a brightly lit toy store; the woman on the right in a blue beret gestures energetically while the woman on the left in a black dress looks on. (2) They stand behind three large pink 'Mega Space Molly' boxes, pointing at them with smiles and high energy. (3) The camera focuses on a lottery board; a hand uses a coin to scratch off a circle, revealing the number 20. (4) The women are shown in a different part of the store with gashapon machines behind them, holding one of the large boxes and waving enthusiastically toward the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately. A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, excited tone in Mandarin. (2) The vocals continue with high density, explaining the rules of the lottery and the value of the prizes. (3) A sharp 'ding' sound effect occurs when the scratch-off number is revealed. (4) The music remains upbeat as the two women bid farewell, their voices overlapping with laughter and excitement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '我竟然中大獎！' (I actually won the big prize!) - Hook/Excited tone. (2) '史上最狂 8880元盲盒' (Craziest 8880 yuan blind box in history) - Functional/Descriptive. (3) '1抽650元的刮刮樂' (650 yuan per scratch-off) - Functional/Informative. (4) '20' with star graphics - Decorative/Impact. (5) '一定要記得看我們YouTube長片' (Be sure to watch our long YouTube video) - Call to Action/Neutral.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female presenters appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a dark blue beret, a white lace vest over a blue turtleneck, and a blue skirt. The second woman is wearing a black off-the-shoulder dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a collectibles store filled with shelves of blind boxes, gashapon machines, and promotional posters for brands like One Piece and Sanrio.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Setup -> Climax/Reveal -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a high-stakes blind box lottery at a specific toy store. By showing the high value of the prizes (8880 NTD) and the excitement of the reveal process, it seeks to generate interest in the physical store's offerings and drive traffic to the creators' long-form YouTube content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of a commercial product (Molly blind boxes), mention of prices, and a call to watch more detailed content about the purchase.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy female duo presentation, variety-show style large font captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'unboxing/shopping' influencer format popular in East Asian social media to promote collectible toy culture.
